**Generated by**: /qa-plan  
**Scope**: 15 stories across Data (graph/CLI), Unity/C2 (frame + surfacing + polish), Simulation (P1 alloc), QA/DevOps/Hygiene (baseline/closeout/layout/playtest/art-bible), and cross-track (perf/dispatch) per sprint plan

| S36-06 Live Editor PNG re-capture | Visual/Feel | Headless proxy unchanged (no new auto) | 12+ PNGs (or lean notes) + evidence in qa/ |

| S36-11 AD-ART-BIBLE sign-off facilitation | Config/Data | None | Verdict recorded in art-bible.md |

**Classification note**: All types inferred from acceptance criteria (no `Type:` header in sprint plan). Graph/CLI tasks classified Logic (computations, validation, determinism, edges). C2/Platform Editor/Unity tasks classified UI (or Visual/Feel for captures). Sim allocation = Logic. Hygiene/re-baseline/closeout = Integration. Docs/plan/art-bible/layout/perf = Config/Data. Playtest classified UI per observable player path. Mixed risk (e.g. S36-07) resolved to primary per Phase 3 guidance; Integration used conservatively where cross-boundary.

## Automated Tests Required

### S36-01 Full-solution re-baseline post-S35 + GitNexus + ReplayGolden 6/6 — Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/` (full sln via existing baselines) + `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests` (ReplayGoldenSuiteTests) + GitNexus indexing harness  
**What to test**:
- Full solution test gate ≥1204 (or post-S35 baseline) PASS
- ReplayGolden 6/6 (engage/classify/stale/readiness/spoof/replay)
- GitNexus index + detect_changes at trunk tip
- No regressions in smoke

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Baseline drift after S35 merges
- Replay divergence on Baltic production pin
- GitNexus node/edge count stability

*No formula found in referenced GDD — test cases must be derived from acceptance criteria directly. Review the GDD Formulas section before writing tests.*

### S36-03 CatalogDependencyGraphIndex Platform→Link edges + tests + invalidation — Logic
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Data.Tests/Validation/...` (extend DependencyGraphIndexTests, KillChainRulePackTests) + `CatalogDependencyGraphIndex` tests  
**What to test**:
- `GetSortedDependencyEdges()` includes `PlatformToLink` edges (PlatformId + LinkId + CommsFittingId derived via FormatCommsKey)
- `CatalogDependencyEdgeKind.PlatformToLink` correctly derived from `!string.IsNullOrEmpty(LinkId)`
- Only approved `review_state` comms bindings + valid link_catalog FKs emit edges (no orphans, no provisional/rejected)
- Unified sort: platform_id → mount/weapon/sensor → link_id → comms_fitting_id (Ordinal); kill-chain edges unchanged
- Invalidation on `ApproveBatch` / `ApproveCommsStaging` / `ApproveLinkStaging` via existing `NotifyDependencyGraphCommitted`
- Hash / world state / golden unchanged for Baltic fixtures

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Zero/empty comms or links
- Orphan LINK (LINK_ORPHAN_COMMS case)
- Staging overlay (CatalogStagingOverlayReader) showing pending link-edge delta
- Mixed edge kinds in single call (PlatformToMount + ... + PlatformToLink)

**Estimated test count**: ~13+ new (mirroring S33-02 precedent) + invalidation rows

### S36-04 CLI extension + golden for link edges — Logic
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.MissionEditor.Cli.Tests` (CatalogDependencyGraphCommand tests) + golden files  
**What to test**:
- `catalog_dependency_graph` (or equivalent) emits `link:{platformId}:{linkId}:{commsFittingId}` lines
- Deterministic output (stable sort + golden parity)
- Existing mount:/weapon:/sensor: lines unchanged

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Empty link set (no output change)
- Multiple links per platform

### S36-05 Unity C2 frame budget capture + remediation — UI
**Test file path**: `src/ProjectAegis.Delegation.UnityAdapter.Tests` (PlayModeSmoke | C2Selection | ... filters)  
**What to test**:
- C2 panel bind / selection / OOB / topbar / catalog viewer timing remains within budget
- Proxy filters continue to pass (18/18 baseline)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Frame spikes on link surfacing or additional C2 elements
- Editor vs. playmode difference

### S36-07 Platform Editor Phase H link surfacing (read-only) — UI
**Test file path**: `PlatformLinkCatalogTests`, `PlatformCommsTests` (UnityAdapter + Data) + viewer projection tests  
**What to test**:
- Viewer shows FKs / CommsFittingId + resolved DisplayName for platform→link
- Reverse lookup (platforms per LinkId) via `BuildLinkToPlatformsIndex`
- No write paths touched; read-only

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Link without matching comms (grey-out or note)
- Staging diff preview of link-edge count

### S36-08 Sim P1 allocation follow-ups — Logic
**Test file path**: Sim tests + replay harnesses  
**What to test**:
- Allocation paths produce identical hashes
- Replay-verify PASS
- No change to production Baltic hash

### S36-13 Dispatching-parallel-agents refinement + S36-14 Closeout hygiene — Integration
**Test file path**: Existing coordinator / smoke / replay harnesses + hygiene tests  
**What to test**:
- Parallel track execution patterns (no race on shared baselines)
- Closeout: full sln + ReplayGolden 6/6 + C2 18/18 + graph landed

### S36-01 / S36-14 / re-baseline stories (shared)
Additional cross-coverage: full sln gate, smoke-check alignment, zero `DelegationBridge.cs` diffs, CatalogWriteGate extend-only.

(Other Logic/Integration stories follow similar derivation from their AC table rows. S36-09 layout changes would update test paths if layout lands.)

## Manual QA Checklist

### S36-05 Unity C2 frame budget capture + remediation — UI
**Verification method**: Profiler capture + frame measurement doc + lead sign-off  
**Who must sign off**: team-unity / qa-lead  
**Evidence to capture**: Editor profiler data + doc in production/perf/ or session logs  

Checklist:
- [ ] Frame budget measurement doc produced
- [ ] Proxy 18/18 maintained after remediation
- [ ] No new spikes on C2 paths (selection, OOB, catalog viewer, topbar)

### S36-06 Live Editor PNG re-capture — Visual/Feel
**Verification method**: PNG capture (or lean notes) + comparison to prior evidence  
**Who must sign off**: team-unity / qa-lead  
**Evidence to capture**: 12+ PNGs (live Editor) under qa/evidence/ or referenced in notes  

Checklist:
- [ ] 12+ PNGs captured (or documented lean notes)
- [ ] No visual regressions vs. prior S34/S35 evidence for C2/Platform paths

### S36-07 Platform Editor Phase H link surfacing (read-only) — UI
**Verification method**: Manual step-through in Editor + viewer checks  
**Who must sign off**: team-unity + team-data / qa-lead  
**Evidence to capture**: Screenshots of FK display in comms list + links list + reverse lookup  

Checklist:
- [ ] Platform select highlights comms rows with matching LinkId edge
- [ ] Link row select shows reverse platforms referencing it (badge or sub-list)
- [ ] CommsFittingId + resolved DisplayName visible
- [ ] Read-only (no new write UI)

### S36-10 Playtest session 8 — UI
**Verification method**: Playtest session + report  
**Who must sign off**: team-qa / designer  
**Evidence to capture**: Report in `production/playtests/` (or session-logs)  

Checklist:
- [ ] Session executed per plan
- [ ] Notes address polish / C2 / graph surfacing feel (as applicable)

### S36-11 AD-ART-BIBLE sign-off facilitation — Config/Data
**Verification method**: Doc review + verdict  
**Who must sign off**: team-ui / art-lead  
**Evidence to capture**: Verdict entry in art-bible.md  

### S36-15 Additional C2 polish — UI
**Verification method**: Manual step-through + filter pass  
**Who must sign off**: team-unity  
**Evidence to capture**: Filter results + screenshots for changed areas  

Checklist:
- [ ] C2 filters pass
- [ ] Polish items (e.g. additional elements from S36-07) observable and clean

(Other stories: S36-02 plan review by team; S36-09 layout/ADR by devops; visual/config items use spot-checks or doc sign-off per AC.)

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for this sprint:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash
2. New game / new session can be started (Baltic fixture or equivalent)
3. Full-solution re-baseline gate (≥1204 or post-S35 baseline) + GitNexus indexed
4. ReplayGolden 6/6 suite PASS (no divergence on engage/classify/stale/readiness/spoof/replay)
5. C2 headless proxy 18/18 (61/61 + 58/58 filters) — PlayModeSmoke|C2Selection|OobTree|...|PlatformLinkCatalog
6. Dependency graph landed: `GetSortedDependencyEdges` returns Platform→Link edges; CLI emits `link:` lines; Platform Editor Phase H surfacing visible (read-only)
7. Production Baltic hash `17144800277401907079` unchanged
8. ZERO diff on `DelegationBridge.cs`; CatalogWriteGate extend-only only
9. Performance within budget (no new frame spikes from C2 work)
10. Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check` before QA hand-off)

*Smoke tests are verified by the developer via `/smoke-check`. Reference this list when running that skill. All merges must preserve ReplayGolden + C2 proxy + Baltic pin per polish-scope-boundary.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| S36-10 Playtest session 8 | Validate polish feel / C2 usability / any graph surfacing clarity for player | 1 | Experienced (prior Baltic/C2 sessions) or new as needed |
| S36-06 / S36-15 (C2 + visual) | Confirm live evidence captures and additional polish do not degrade perceived responsiveness or information density | Advisory (as part of S36-10 if scheduled) | Experienced |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes must be written to `production/playtests/` (or `production/session-logs/playtest-[sprint]-[story-slug].md`) and reviewed by the qa-lead / designer before the story can be marked COMPLETE.

If no stories require playtest validation: *S36-10 is explicitly scheduled; others advisory per lean polish mode.*

---

## Definition of Done — This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories (e.g. graph index tests, CLI goldens, C2 proxy maintenance, replay gates)
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Visual/Feel and UI stories (PNGs, frame docs, viewer screenshots, art-bible verdict, playtest report)
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off) — full sln + ReplayGolden 6/6 + C2 18/18 + graph landed
- [ ] No regressions introduced (Baltic hash, DelegationBridge untouched, existing filters/goldens)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] Parallel track closeout (S36-14) confirms all waves green

**Sprint gates (from plan)**: All Must Have; QA plan (this doc); smoke; replay 6/6; proxy 18/18; graph landed. Authority: polish-scope-boundary-2026-06-19.md (Phase 2 continuation).
